x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: IP range coverage determines which infrastructure discovery can find. Gaps in coverage create blind spots in the CMDB that Now Assist cannot reason about.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Define IP ranges for all known infrastructure segments via discovery_range_list.do. Cross-reference against network topology documentation to identify gaps. IP range gaps create CMDB blind spots that Now Assist cannot reason about during incident response.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_b2f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851cab
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[IP range coverage determines which infrastructure discovery can find. Gaps in coverage create blind spots in the CMDB that Now Assist cannot reason about.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Discovery Coverage by IP Range</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('discovery_range');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var ranges = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = ranges + ' IP ranges defined for discovery';

    if (ranges >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: ranges + ' IP ranges configured. Discovery has broad infrastructure coverage for Now Assist ITOM context building.'
        };
    } else if (ranges >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + ranges + ' IP range(s) defined (target: 3+). Discovery coverage gaps create CMDB blind spots that Now Assist ITOM cannot reason about during incident response.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No IP ranges defined for discovery. Now Assist ITOM has no infrastructure scope to discover — CMDB will lack the CI data required for AI impact analysis.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITOM</module><number>CHK0000356</number><order>20</order><remediation_guidance>Define IP ranges for all known infrastructure segments via discovery_range_list.do. Cross-reference against network topology documentation to identify gaps. IP range gaps create CMDB blind spots that Now Assist cannot reason about during incident response.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>b2f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851cab</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Discovery Coverage by IP Range</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_b2f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851cab</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
